name: DesperaDrops
short_description: A romance visual novel game made in collaboration with D3P and Red Entertainment. Crime ADV “DesperaDrops” of love and escape. An innocent fugitive and six villains. Their escape in search of freedom begins--...
detailed_description:
Crime ADV “DesperaDrops” of love and escape

D3P Otome Department, known for “Nightshade,” and Red Entertainment have teamed up again to present the new crime suspense “DesperaDrops”.

The game features the first Otome game with Yusuke Kozaki as the main character designer and Ririka Yoshimura, a popular writer who has written numerous scenarios for Otome games.

Set in various European countries, the game depicts the human characters who are being hunted for crimes they did not commit.

In the summer of 2028, Mika Amamine, studying abroad at a university in Bologna, Italy, visits Rome for a short trip with friends to celebrate the end of exams.

However, during that trip, she encounters a murder incident and is subsequently arrested as a suspect.

While being transported in a police vehicle, it suddenly overturns in an accident, freeing Mika along with six other criminals and they all become fugitives. 

Mysterious attackers appear, targeting the unique “power” that Mika possesses, and the group finds themselves pursued by both the police and the attackers.

The secret hidden within Mika’s power, the identity of the attackers, and the truth behind the murder incident that started it all…

Can they unravel these mysteries and reclaim a normal life?

[Choices]

During your escape, you will be forced to make various choices. Your choices will affect the "likability" of the other character and the protagonist's own "criminality," which will affect the development of the story and the ending.

[Sidecar Part]

During the escape, you can choose who will drive the motorcycle on which the main character rides in the sidecar. By choosing your partner, you can discover an unexpected side of them and deepen your bond.

[Mission Mode]

During the story, you may encounter mission modes that require cooperation from all your allies, such as stealing important items or escaping from a building. In mission mode, you will watch footage from six separate security cameras and give appropriate instructions to your allies according to the situation to lead the mission to success.

Ash Meyer (cv.Ryota Suzuki)

Hamiel Luís (cv.Kazuki Kato)

Gib Baltzer (cv.Ryota Takeuchi)

Ramie Carrière (cv.Yuto Uemura)

Camu Einhard (cv.Shinnosuke Tachibana)

Sally Del Testa (cv.Kanae Ito)

Mika Amamine(default name) (cv.Mika Okamoto)

*Only the first name of the main character can be changed.

 If you use the default name, it'll be voiced by the characters.

*Character voicing is in Japanese only.

【"EXTRA CONTENTS" include】

You can also enjoy the 7 “After Stories” that follow the happy endings of each route.

Full voice acting and event graphics for each story!

Please select from the “EXTRA CONTENTS” on the main menu.

【Regarding the uploading and streaming of "DesperaDrops" gameplay】

Thank you very much for your interest in our games.

You are only allowed to upload/stream videos free of charge if the below rules are observed.

*Only content from the Prologue to the Ending is permitted.

*Please enjoy the “After Stories” on your own.

*You are not permitted to distribute gameplay for business purposes.
